name: cclaw-cli
description: Installer-first flow toolkit for coding agents

scripts.clean:dist: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then((fs) => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/chmod-bin.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run build && node scripts/verify-bin-executable.mjs && npm run test && node scripts/lint-generated-hooks.mjs && node scripts/build-plugin-manifests.mjs && npm pack --dry-run && node scripts/smoke-init.mjs
